info.title: My Basket App - API Gateway
info.description:
Unified API documentation for all microservices in the My Basket App. All requests can be routed through this gateway.

## Getting Started

### Authentication Flow
1. Register a new user: `POST /api/users/register`
2. Login: `POST /api/users/login`
3. Use the returned JWT token in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header for all protected endpoints

### Public Endpoints (No Auth Required)
- `GET /api/products` - Browse all products
- `GET /api/products/{id}` - View product details
- `POST /api/users/register` - Create account
- `POST /api/users/login` - Login
- `GET /health` - Check service health
- `GET /info` - Get gateway information

### Protected Endpoints (Requires Auth)
- All endpoints under `/api/cart/` - Shopping cart operations
- All endpoints under `/api/orders/` - Order management
- All endpoints under `/api/recommendations/` - AI recommendations
- `GET /api/users/{userId}` - User profile operations

## Service Architecture
The API Gateway routes requests to individual microservices:
- **User Service** (Port 3005): Authentication, user profiles
- **Product Service** (Port 3001): Product catalog
- **Cart Service** (Port 3002): Shopping cart management
- **Order Service** (Port 3003): Order management
- **AI Service** (Port 3004): Recommendations engine

BearerAuth.description: JWT token from /api/users/login or /api/users/register. Include as: Authorization: Bearer <token>

get.description: Check the health status of the API Gateway and all microservices

503.description: One or more services are unhealthy

get.description: Get information about the API Gateway and available services

400.description: Invalid input or username/email already exists

get.description: Verify if a JWT token is valid and return the associated user
Retrieve a user profile by ID
Retrieve a paginated list of products with optional filters
Retrieve a single product by its unique identifier
Retrieve the shopping cart for a specific user

post.description: Add a product to the user's shopping cart

put.description: Update the quantity of a product in the shopping cart

delete.description: Remove a product from the user's shopping cart
Remove all items from a user's shopping cart

post.description: Create a new order from the user's cart

get.description: Retrieve all orders for a specific user

put.description: Update the status of an existing order

post.description: Get AI-powered grocery suggestions based on cart items
Get personalized product recommendations based on user history and cart items
